name: omnicord
description: Your AI runs your Discord server: chat, moderation, admin, even building it all from one brief.
long_description: Omnicord gives an AI assistant full operational control of a Discord server through your own bot: 151 tools covering chat, moderation, automod, events, and administration, up to building out a complete community server from a one paragraph brief. Destructive actions never execute on the first call; they return a preview and require explicit confirmation, enforced by the server itself rather than the model.

discord_token.title: Discord bot token
discord_token.description: Needed for anything real. From the Discord Developer Portal: your application, Bot page, Reset Token. Turn on all three Privileged Gateway Intents while you are there. The server starts without it and its setup check explains what to fix.

guild.title: Default server id
guild.description: Optional. With it set, tools can omit the server parameter.
